titleStmt.title: SII 24.102: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 102. (A.R. No. 32 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Records a sale of tirumaḍaippaḷḷippuṟam land in Viḷattūr-nāḍu to Arayaṉ Tirumaḻapāḍi-uḍaiyāṉ alias Rājavallavap-Pallavaraiyaṉ of Koṟṟamaṅgalam in Eyil-nāḍu for a flower garden. The record is dated in the 44th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemi yaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jaya makaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭ ṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇantu matuvarai yiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayilmunaik kontaḷavaracar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷ vali kāṭṭi porppari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟu
tti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit ten ticait temaru kamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭai nannilappāvai tanimaiyun taviravantu punitaṟṟirumaṇi makuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭi Iraṇṭun taṭa muṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa munnai manuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai Irunila viḷākam Eṅkaṇun tanātu
tiru niḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani meruvil puliviḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟi vāntarattup pūpar tiṟai viṭutan=ta kalañ corikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai paruntalaittiṭat tan ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa vinnāḷ piṟkulappiṟai pol niṟ piḻai . yennuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tan kai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvenat tuṅkapat
tiraiyaḷavuṟṟu veṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa tan mānamuṅ kūṟina viramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta netikaḷuñ cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talaivirit talamarak kuṭai ticai tannāṭukantu tānuntānaiyum pannāḷiṭṭap pala pala mutuku payan tetir māṟi [ja]yap peruntiruvum paḻiyuka pukaḻin celviyum vāḷā
viṭṭa maṭantayariṭṭamu miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyuṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamu m ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaik koṇṭiṇṭi ya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅkoḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru parittalaṅkaḷum poruparittaraṅkamum tantiravāriyum Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭa ka pola
ttan peruñ cenai Evippañcavaraivarum poruta porkkaḷattañci veruneḷit toṭi Araṇenappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum koṟṟa veñcurameṟṟik koṟṟa [vijaya]stampam ticai toṟu niṟutti muttin calāpa yamum matta veṅkari
kaik koṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭik kaṭal malai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāverellān tani vicum peṟa māveṟiya tan varutanit talaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟi toṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟal koḷ virasiṅhāsanantiriya viṭṭaruḷip poṅkoḷiyāramun tiruppuyattalaṅkalum poliya vīramun tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārt toḻac ci
vaniṭattumaiyanat tiyākavalli Avani muḻutuṭaiyāḷiruppa Avaḷuṭan kaṅkai viṟṟiruppa maṅkayar tilatam Eḻicai vallapi Eḻulakamuṭaiyāḷ vāḻi malarntini tiruppa Ūḻiyum Avani muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesaripanmarāna cakkara vatti śrī kolottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpattu nālāvatu pāṇṭiya kulācani vaḷanāṭṭu
viḷānāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkattāḻvār koyilukku śrī kāriyañ ceykiṟa nittavinota muventaveḷār Ēvalpaṭi śrīvayiṣṇavāriyam tiruvaraṅkappiccarum tiruveṅkaṭap piccarum ci puṇṭarikanampiyum tiruvaraṅkatāsarum ci paṇṭāravāriyam Āritan Ārāvamutu puṇṭarikanum pāratāyan cirāman Ārāvamutum Āritan kecuvan tani Iḷañciṅkamum kecavan Aṟivariyān tiruveṅkaṭavan ciṅkamum kāśya
pan ciṅkan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇanum Uḷḷiṭṭa I paṇṭāravāriyam sabhaikkaṇa kku Arayan Ampalakkūttanāna nānūṟṟuvappiriyanum Ārāvamutu villiyāna civayi ṣṇavappiriyanum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvanaivom pāṇṭi kulācanivaḷanāṭṭu Eyil nāṭṭu koṟṟamaṅkalamuṭaiyān Aṟaiyan tirumaḻapāṭi Uṭaiyānāna rājavallavap pallavarayarkku tanmam ceyya nāṅkaḷ Aṭuttu kuṭut
tanilamāvatu Āḻvār tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuṟamāna rājamahentravaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭu kaṟkuṭiyil Aṭuttuk kuṭutta nilattukku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai kūṭalūr Ellaikku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai tiruveṇkāṭan viḷaintu varukiṟa nilattu vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai tiruveṇkāṭan nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai (llai) veṭṭiyar nilattukkum tilata
ka vayakkal nilam Iraṇṭu māvukkum teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta perunnākellaiyuḷ paṭṭa nilamikutikku � ṟavuḷḷaṭaṅka nilam kāl Innilam kā tsarattin Utteca kuṭṭa miṭṭup payirc ceyya Uṇṇātu kiṭantamaiyil Innilam Arayan tirumaḻapāṭi Uṭaiyānāna rājavallapa pallavarayar tiruvaraṅkattāḻvārkku ceyvitta tirunantavanam tirumaḻa vāṭi kū van
taruñceytaruḷi tirunantavānappuṟamāka tiruttukiṟa nilam kālukku nilavilai kāl kācukku ci paṇṭāratte vaittukkoṇṭa Innilattukkum puṉcai varicai velinilat tukku rājakecariyāl Āḷ Iraṇṭukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Āka Iraṇṭukku
nāḷ Oṉṟukku ḷa patakkāka Āṇṭuvarai veṇṭu ḷa Aṟupatin kalamum perāl (perāl) kāconṟāka Āḷ Iraṇṭukkuk kāciraṇṭukkum Innila yta tirunaṟaiyūr nampiyum Ivan ḷḷittāmam
nittamāka Ittiru[ nan=ta] vānatte paṟiccuk koṭuvantu paṇi māṟak kaṭavarākavum Ippaṭi ceyyārāThis may be the length sign for ra and the reading may be ceyyārākil •kil rājavallavap pallavaraiyarum vaṟkat nantavanam kuṟaivaṟaccey matittu Aṭuttukkuṭuttom vāyan ti
rumaḻapāṭi Uṭaiyānāna rājavallavap pallavarayarkku Āḻvār kanmikaḷom Ippaṭikku Ivai sabhaik kaṇakku tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyār nūṟṟuppiriyan Ivai Enneḻuttu Iṭai Ārāva Ippaṭikku Ivai Āritan Ārā Ippaṭikku
Ivai ci puṇṭarīkanampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku cirāman Ārāvamuti neḻuttu Ippaṭikku kāśyapan ciṅkan tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇan Eḻuttu I ttiruvaraṅkappiccan ciriḷaṅko ppaṭikku Ivai neḻuttuThe rest is lost or the inscription ends here.
Digital edition of SII 24.102 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
